A '''[[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]''' served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]] and was responsible for the training of Jedi [[Vima-Da-Boda]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the time of peace in the centuries following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]] of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Raised at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] as a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] in the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]], the young man was selected for training as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by a wise [[Unidentified female Jedi Master|Master]].<ref name="Endnotes" />

During his training with his Master, she presented him with an [[Vima-Da-Boda's lightsaber|ancient lightsaber]], leaving it a mystery as to where it came from. After traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] together, the man ascended to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and between [[200 BBY/Legends|200]] and [[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]], selected the young Initiate [[Vima-Da-Boda]] as his own Padawan. Like his Master had done during his training, he presented his student with the lightsaber, and she went onto to become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="Endnotes" />
